title: Readonly array (ReadonlyArray<T> / readonly T[])
description: `readonly T[]` and `ReadonlyArray<T>` are the same type at runtime — the readonly bit is a TS-only modifier erased at emit. Regression check that both forms produce the same validator as the bare `T[]` shape.
notes: Readonly modifier has NO runtime impact — the validator is identical to `T[]`. The compiler enforces readonly at write sites; the validator only checks the value shape.
